name: PER_MANAGER_HRCHY_DN
description: This table stores the flattened manager hierarchy details. The denormalized details are derived from the supervisors tables and stored in this table.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: IMMEDIATE_REPORTEE_ASG_ID
columns.Comments: IMMEDIATE_REPORTEE_ASG_ID column is for internal use in PL/SQL procedure calls. It will not be exposed in the view or entity objects.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_ASSIGNMENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether the assignment is the primary

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Per Persons. Identifies the Person record

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foregin Key to Per Assignments. Identifies the manager's assignment

columns.Name: MANAGER_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Not supported

columns.Name: PRIMARY_MANAGER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Set to Y if manager type = LINE_MANAGER. Automatically generated

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the type of manager: line manager, project manager, etc

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: MANAGER_ID, MANAGER_LEVEL, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, MANAGER_TYPE, ASSIGNMENT_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID, MANAGER_ID, MANAGER_LEVEL, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, MANAGER_TYPE, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, ASSIGNMENT_ID, PERSON_ID
ASSIGNMENT_ID, PERSON_ID, MANAGER_LEVEL, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, MANAGER_TYPE, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, MANAGER_ID, MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID, ASSIGNMENT_ID, PERSON_ID, MANAGER_ID, MANAGER_LEVEL, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, MANAGER_TYPE, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
